allResults.name: Vista Solutions
allResults.description:
Vista Solutions Inc. is a leading North American provider of machine vision integration and consultancy services, with offices in the USA, Canada, and Mexico. Vista’s primary objective is to be the “one-stop-shop” for all things related to machine vision - solutions, service, consultancy, and hardware. Vista designs and delivers automated machine vision solutions to a diverse client and industry base including Manufacturing (Automotive, Food and Beverage, Medical Devices, Consumer Products, Aerospace, etc.), Logistics, Infrastructure, and Mining. Vista’s offices are home to some of the most advanced machine vision laboratories in North America, including 6-axis robots, conveyance systems, and machine vision hardware (including cameras, lighting, 3D imagers, etc.) - everything required to setup Vista’s clients for machine vision success from Step #1: Image. Vista’s Areas of Expertise Include: • Automated Inspection (Quality Assurance, Defect Detection, etc.) • Vision-Guided Robotics • Non-Contact Measurement and Gauging • Tracking and Traceability (OCR, Barcodes, etc.) • Artificial Intelligence (AI) -based Inspection Solutions Vista’s Services Include: • On-Site Support / Service • Solution Integration / Deployment Services • Vision Evaluative Services - Camera and Lighting Selection - On-Site Assessments - Development of Vision Integration Standards • Machine Vision R&D - Engineering / Feasibility Studies - Proof of Concepts (PoCs) / Prototype Vision Systems • Vision Software Development - Custom Software Applications - Vision Algorithm Development - AI-based Inspection Models • Consultation - Design Review / Auditing Services - Scale-Up / Roll-Out Planning Vista’s Process: Vista’s 3-step approach to machine vision feasibility, risk mitigation, and client success. 1. Image 2. Analyze 3. Automate || Vista Solutions Inc. is a leading North American provider of machine vision integration and consultancy services, with offices in the USA, Canada, and Mexico. Vista’s primary objective is to be the “one-stop-shop” for all things related to machine vision - solutions, service, consultancy, and hardware. Vista designs and delivers automated machine vision solutions to a diverse client and industry base including Manufacturing (Automotive, Food and Beverage, Medical Devices, Consumer Products, Aerospace, etc.), Logistics, Infrastructure, and Mining. Vista’s offices are home to some of the most advanced machine vision laboratories in North America, including 6-axis robots, conveyance systems, and machine vision hardware (including cameras, lighting, 3D imagers, etc.) - everything required to setup Vista’s clients for machine vision success from Step #1: Image. Vista’s Areas of Expertise Include: • Automated Inspection (Quality Assurance, Defect Detection, etc.) • Vision-Guided Robotics • Non-Contact Measurement and Gauging • Tracking and Traceability (OCR, Barcodes, etc.) • Artificial Intelligence (AI) -based Inspection Solutions Vista’s Services Include: • On-Site Support / Service • Solution Integration / Deployment Services • Vision Evaluative Services - Camera and Lighting Selection - On-Site Assessments - Development of Vision Integration Standards • Machine Vision R&D - Engineering / Feasibility Studies - Proof of Concepts (PoCs) / Prototype Vision Systems • Vision Software Development - Custom Software Applications - Vision Algorithm Development - AI-based Inspection Models • Consultation - Design Review / Auditing Services - Scale-Up / Roll-Out Planning Vista’s Process: Vista’s 3-step approach to machine vision feasibility, risk mitigation, and client success. 1. Image 2. Analyze 3. Automate | Vista Solutions Inc. is a market leading machine vision solution provider and integrator. AIA Certified, in business since 2003. | Vista Solutions is a industrial automation company located in Windsor. | Computers-System Designers & Consultants | Vista Solutions Corporation provides information technology solutions. The Company offers access, protect and manage the data of small business, enterprise, and healthcare sectors. Vista Solutions conducts its business in the State of Colorado. | Vista Solutions is a market leading advanced engineering and technology company with a technical and business model focus on the field of machine vision integration.

Vista Solutions is comprised of three business units: 
1) Smart Camera Solutions
2) Custom Solutions
3) Vision Guided Robotics

Vista Solutions is experienced in many industries including automotive, metal casting, medical devices, pharmaceutical, food & beverage, packaging & paper, consumer products, military/defence, aerospace, energy/nuclear and government. 

Vista Solutions maintains offices and state-of-the-art laboratories in Canada, United States and Mexico. | Vista Solutions specializes in working IT & business professionals executives who are frustrated with the time and money wasted dealing with slow applications and websites or are concerned that they might not discover a security breach before it's too late. 

Generally, our clients come to us because they are:

-	Tired of users and customers complaining that they can't work
-	Irritated that it takes so long to identify the source of a problem
-	Worried that not knowing what is going on in their network is making them more vulnerable to security risks

For over 40 years, Vista Solutions has helped everyone from small businesses to international Fortune 100 companies saved millions of dollars and hundreds of productive hours by helping them find and fix performance and security issues faster. 

We may not be the best choice for every business, but the clients we work with stay with us for years because they trust us and the solutions we deliver.

If any of these are issues you are facing, we may be able to help.

Contact us to see if we might be a good fit: 

http://vistasolutions.net/contact-us/ | For more than 45 years, Vista Solutions Corporation has been manufacturing computers, system designers and computer software. Located in Fort Collins, Colo., the company is a full-service information technology engineering firm. Vista Solutions Corporation has a vast client list ranging from Fortune 50 to mid-tier organizations across many industries. The company has designed information technology solutions for over 100 enterprise clients. It specializes in high-availability computing, disaster recovery, data protection, information lifecycle management, enterprise storage and backup and many others. Vista Solutions Corporation has partnerships with a number of companies, including Hewlett-Packard Development Company, L.P, DataCore Software and SYNNEX Corporation, among others.

allResults.name: Industrial Vision & Metrology Systems
allResults.description:
Industrial Vision & Metrology Systems (IVMS) provides advanced machine vision, precision metrology and automation solutions for manufacturers where quality, accuracy and traceability are critical.

IVMS was formed in 2026 through the merger of Industrial Vision Systems and The Sempre Group, combining automated machine vision engineering with deep expertise in high-precision metrology. The result is a broader capability supporting manufacturers with both automated inspection systems and advanced measurement technologies.

Our solutions are used across manufacturing environments where quality, accuracy and traceability are critical.

CAPABILITIES
• Automated machine vision inspection systems
• Precision metrology technologies and measurement solutions
• Inline and offline inspection for manufacturing processes
• Vision-guided automation and robotics integration
• Engineering, system integration and technical support

IVMS solutions range from bespoke machine vision systems and integrated inspection machines through to high-precision metrology instruments and software for advanced measurement, data analysis and quality control.

INDUSTRIES
• Medical devices & pharmaceuticals
• Aerospace & precision engineering
• Automotive & electrification
• Electronics & semiconductors
• Advanced industrial manufacturing

Through a combination of advanced imaging, AI-enabled vision software, high-accuracy metrology technologies and automation integration, IVMS helps manufacturers move towards fully digital, data-driven production environments.

IVMS is part of Oxford Metrics plc, a global smart sensing and software company focused on advanced measurement, sensing and data technologies. || Industrial Vision & Metrology Systems (IVMS) provides advanced machine vision, precision metrology and automation solutions for manufacturers where quality, accuracy and traceability are critical.

IVMS was formed in 2026 through the merger of Industrial Vision Systems and The Sempre Group, combining automated machine vision engineering with deep expertise in high-precision metrology. The result is a broader capability supporting manufacturers with both automated inspection systems and advanced measurement technologies.

Our solutions are used across manufacturing environments where quality, accuracy and traceability are critical.

CAPABILITIES
• Automated machine vision inspection systems
• Precision metrology technologies and measurement solutions
• Inline and offline inspection for manufacturing processes
• Vision-guided automation and robotics integration
• Engineering, system integration and technical support

IVMS solutions range from bespoke machine vision systems and integrated inspection machines through to high-precision metrology instruments and software for advanced measurement, data analysis and quality control.

INDUSTRIES
• Medical devices & pharmaceuticals
• Aerospace & precision engineering
• Automotive & electrification
• Electronics & semiconductors
• Advanced industrial manufacturing

Through a combination of advanced imaging, AI-enabled vision software, high-accuracy metrology technologies and automation integration, IVMS helps manufacturers move towards fully digital, data-driven production environments.

IVMS is part of Oxford Metrics plc, a global smart sensing and software company focused on advanced measurement, sensing and data technologies.

allResults.name: Smitech
allResults.description:
Smitech develops and delivers turnkey automation solutions for manufacturing companies. The company designs and builds production lines, fully automated and semi-automated assembly equipment, and industrial robot systems, including collaborative and mobile robots. Its engineers implement industrial automation and control systems, machine vision solutions for quality inspection, and custom machine-building projects across sectors such as electronics, automotive, wood, plastics, and construction. Smitech supports customers from concept development through engineering, component sourcing, assembly, software development, on-site installation, and commissioning. It also provides aftercare services including maintenance, upgrades, spare parts, and training for production personnel. || At Smitech, we're committed to providing the highest quality factory automation solutions for manufacturing companies of all sizes. With a team of engineers with over 10 years of experience in the industry, we've established ourselves as a leading provider of cutting-edge automation technologies and services.

Our team of experts works closely with clients to understand their unique needs and develop customized solutions that maximize efficiency, improve productivity, and reduce costs. Whether it's designing and implementing new production lines or upgrading existing systems, we have the expertise and resources to ensure success.

At Smitech, we pride ourselves on our dedication to quality, reliability, and innovation. Our solutions are designed to meet the highest industry standards and are backed by our commitment to ongoing support and maintenance.

We're excited to help businesses across a wide range of industries optimize their manufacturing processes and achieve their goals. Contact us today to learn more about our services and how we can help take your business to the next level.

To learn more about our factory automation solutions and services, please visit our website at www.smitech.ee/en

Our strategy is to become a strategic partner for our customers by offering complete service - from design & engineering to installation activities. We also provide maintenance for ready-made systems. | Smitech designs and builds turnkey industrial automation systems, production lines, and custom machine-building solutions. | Smitech develops and delivers turnkey automation solutions for manufacturing companies. The company designs and builds production lines, fully automated and semi-automated assembly equipment, and industrial robot systems, including collaborative and mobile robots. Its engineers implement industrial automation and control systems, machine vision solutions for quality inspection, and custom machine-building projects across sectors such as electronics, automotive, wood, plastics, and construction. Smitech supports customers from concept development through engineering, component sourcing, assembly, software development, on-site installation, and commissioning. It also provides aftercare services including maintenance, upgrades, spare parts, and training for production personnel.

allResults.name: Isra Vision
allResults.description:
Isra Vision AG develops and markets control software and systems for image processing, optics, industrial process skills, and robotics. The Company produces two and three dimensional robot controls for goods manufacturing and quality assurance. Isra Vision serves customers worldwide. || Isra Vision AG is a Germany-based company that, through its subsidiaries, is engaged in the development, production and marketing of industrial image processing systems. | Public company | ISRA SURFACE VISION is a industrial automation company their's high-performance components, in high-resolution cameras & fast-switching LED. | Isra Vision AG develops and markets control software and systems for image processing, optics, industrial process skills, and robotics. The Company produces two and three dimensional robot controls for goods manufacturing and quality assurance. Isra Vision serves customers worldwide. | Machine Vision is one of the key technologies for industrial digitization, and ISRA VISION is one of the international providers that has been ensuring the success of large manufacturing companies worldwide for over 35 years. ISRA's high-performance technologies, in particular, high-resolution cameras and fast-switching LEDs, enable capturing structures in the nanometer and nanopixel range, even at extremely high speeds. | ISRA VISION is a globally leading supplier of optical solutions for 3D machine vision and surface inspection.

Our innovative core competencies are based in the development of user-specific software for sophisticated, intelligent Machine Vision systems, firmware & hardware.

We offer efficient Machine Vision solutions for automation of highly complex tasks in the following important areas:

Robot Vision - Robot guidance for difficult tasks such as positioning, assembly, handling or paint finishing. Our portfolio of internationally unique solutions ranges from 2 D to 6 D.

Surface Vision - Guaranteed quality with 100% inspection of glass, foils, metals, paper and plastics at high speeds or complex paint finished surfaces. | Machine Vision is one of the key technologies for industrial digitization, and ISRA VISION is one of the international providers that has been ensuring the success of large manufacturing companies worldwide for over 35 years - in close cooperation with leading technology universities and innovation centers. ISRA's high-performance components, in particular, high-resolution cameras and fast-switching LEDs, enable capturing structures in the nanometer and nanopixel range, even at extremely high speeds.

Since its foundation, ISRA's focus and strengths have been in the development of advanced embedded technologies and highly complex algorithms and bring them to market as easy-to-use touch-and-automate and plug-and-automate systems. These machine systems, based on Industry 4.0-enabled concepts, provide an effective foundation for sustainable customer success based on the partnership from consulting to integration. From process automation and product optimization to product efficiency and revenue maximization, our innovative portfolio covers the entire production chain, deployed in renowned companies from around the world. For example, international premium car manufacturers and well-known market leaders from the information and communication industries rely on automation technology solutions from ISRA.

On three continents and at more than 25 locations worldwide, we are always close to our customers and continuously support them in maximizing their production success. While at the same time, we are already developing systems for the visions of future industrial production, based on our broad technology portfolio and thus offering our partner companies a quick return on investment. | BU General Industries | Entwicklung, Herstellung und Vertrieb von Machine-Vision-Systemen. | Entwicklung, Herstellung und Vertrieb von Machine-Vision-Systemen für die Oberflächeninspektion. | Machine Vision is one of the key technologies for industrial digitization, and ISRA VISION is one of the international providers that has been ensuring the success of large manufacturing companies worldwide for over 35 years - in close cooperation with leading technology universities and innovation centers. ISRA's high-performance components, in particular, high-resolution cameras and fast-switching LEDs, enable capturing structures in the nanometer and nanopixel range, even at extremely high speeds. Since its foundation, ISRA's focus and strengths have been in the development of advanced embedded technologies and highly complex algorithms and bring them to market as easy-to-use touch-and-automate and plug-and-automate systems. These machine systems, based on Industry 4.0-enabled concepts, provide an effective foundation for sustainable customer success based on the partnership from consulting to integration. From process automation and product optimization to product efficiency and revenue maximization, our innovative portfolio covers the entire production chain, deployed in renowned companies from around the world. For example, international premium car manufacturers and well-known market leaders from the information and communication industries rely on automation technology solutions from ISRA. On three continents and at more than 25 locations worldwide, we are always close to our customers and continuously support them in maximizing their production success. While at the same time, we are already developing systems for the visions of future industrial production, based on our broad technology portfolio and thus offering our partner companies a quick return on investment. | Isra Vision AG develops and markets control software and systems for image processing, optics, industrial process skills and robotics. The Company produces two and three dimensional robot controls for goods manufacturing and  quality assurance.  Isra Vision AG sells its software worldwide.

allResults.name: Worldwide Quality Control
allResults.description:
ABOUT US 
Worldwide Quality Control (formerly Asia Quality Control) was established in 2011 with a clear vision in mind: to deliver top-notch quality inspection services that help businesses achieve their quality goals and maximize their global market success. 

With over more than 10 years of industry experience, our team of engineering experts is committed to providing the highest quality services to our clients in 

OUR SERVICES
# Our Quality Inspection Services:
•	Pre-production Inspections: We scrutinize raw materials, components, and processes before production commences to prevent costly errors.
•	In-process Inspections: We monitor the manufacturing process to ensure consistent product quality throughout production.
•	Pre-shipment Inspections: We perform thorough quality checks before shipment to avoid costly returns and recalls.
•	Production Monitoring: We perform day to day monitoring of your production
•	Defectives Sorting: We perform sorting of defectives products on your proudction line.


# Our Supplier Audit Services:
•	Supplier Qualification Audits: We assess supplier capabilities to meet your quality and compliance requirements.
•	Supplier Performance Audits: We conduct regular audits to ensure suppliers maintain their quality standards.
•	Compliance Audits: We ensure suppliers adhere to all industry standards and regulatory requirements.

# Our other Services:
- Defects Root Cause Analysis and Resolution
- Quality Control checklist establishment

# Product Testing & Certification
- Lab Testing
- Product Certification

# Industries:
Automotives, Railway, Aerospace, Technical and Industrial, Electronic, Mechanical Parts, Building and Construction, Medical Devices and Supplies, Food, Consumer  

CONTACT US
If you are in search of reliable quality inspection services in Worldwide, Worldwide Quality Control is here to assist you. || Worldwide Quality Control is a quality assurance company that provides supplier audit and product laboratory test management services. | ABOUT US

•	Production Monitoring: We perform day to day monitoring of your production

allResults.name: Advanced Machine Integrations
allResults.description: Advanced Machine Integrations provides custom machine vision and automation solutions for manufacturing environments. The company designs, programs, and integrates Cognex-based inspection systems for tasks such as code reading, OCR, part presence, measurement, robot guidance, and 3D inspection. It also builds pick-and-place cells, cobot applications, and turnkey production machines tailored to specific processes. Typical customers operate in pharmaceutical, food, paper, plastics, automotive, and packaging industries. Services span troubleshooting, upgrades, and new system delivery, including consultation, testing, commissioning, training, and ongoing support. || AMI designs and integrates bespoke machine vision and automation systems for manufacturing companies across multiple sectors. | Advanced Machine Integrations provides custom machine vision and automation solutions for manufacturing environments. The company designs, programs, and integrates Cognex-based inspection systems for tasks such as code reading, OCR, part presence, measurement, robot guidance, and 3D inspection. It also builds pick-and-place cells, cobot applications, and turnkey production machines tailored to specific processes. Typical customers operate in pharmaceutical, food, paper, plastics, automotive, and packaging industries. Services span troubleshooting, upgrades, and new system delivery, including consultation, testing, commissioning, training, and ongoing support.
allResults.rationale: Company description shows hands-on machine-vision or industrial AI consulting delivery for clients.

allResults.name: CamCom
allResults.description:
CamCom is an award-winning, industry agnostic AI powered platform for visual inspections built on a computer vision stack. We are pioneers in leveraging CV and associated technologies in the visual inspection process. We deploy our solutions through bespoke Rigs, mobile devices or UAVs depending on the customer requirements for precision and speed. We work closely with our customers to enable retrofit solutions that do not require too many changes to the existing workflow. Defect/damage visual inspections are labour intensive and therefore subjective, slow, and prone to error. We eliminate subjectivity, future proof the process and make sure that the current throughput is not affected in any way. Our solution is the ultimate control tower that enables creation of a visual track and trace audit trail across the life cycle of the product. Our solutions increase efficiencies and offer non-linear scalability. We ensure contactless solutions that enable our partners to have business continuity. Our current operations are in India, Middle East, and Southeast Asia. We plan to expand into other regions very soon and position ourselves as the quality inspection partner of choice for enterprises across the world by future proofing their processes. We are headquartered in Bangalore, INDIA and have an office in Dubai, UAE. The company has today grown into a strong team of technocrats and thinkers who are reimagining the future. || CamCom is an award-winning, industry agnostic AI powered platform for visual inspections built on a computer vision stack. We are pioneers in leveraging CV and associated technologies in the visual inspection process. We deploy our solutions through bespoke Rigs, mobile devices or UAVs depending on the customer requirements for precision and speed. We work closely with our customers to enable retrofit solutions that do not require too many changes to the existing workflow. Defect/damage visual inspections are labour intensive and therefore subjective, slow, and prone to error. We eliminate subjectivity, future proof the process and make sure that the current throughput is not affected in any way. Our solution is the ultimate control tower that enables creation of a visual track and trace audit trail across the life cycle of the product. Our solutions increase efficiencies and offer non-linear scalability. We ensure contactless solutions that enable our partners to have business continuity. Our current operations are in India, Middle East, and Southeast Asia. We plan to expand into other regions very soon and position ourselves as the quality inspection partner of choice for enterprises across the world by future proofing their processes. We are headquartered in Bangalore, INDIA and have an office in Dubai, UAE. The company has today grown into a strong team of technocrats and thinkers who are reimagining the future. | CamCom in a deeptech startup with primary focus on quality assessment, defect and damage detection , using computer vision | CamCom is a future-driven brand offering AI automation for Enterprise Quality Control. We harness computer vision and deep learning to automate quality checks across the product lifecycle using machine-vision cameras and mobile phones. Driven by strong values of innovation, agility and resilience, we offer bespoke solutions that remove human subjectivity, in addition to being efficient and reliable.  

Currently catering to the Automotive and Warehousing industries, CamCom aims to be the preferred quality assurance partner for enterprises, across the globe. Headquartered in Bangalore, the company has today grown into a strong team of technocrats and thinkers who are reimagining the future.
allResults.rationale: Explicit delivery of AI-powered visual inspection solutions with retrofit and bespoke rig deployment.

allResults.name: Sealpac UK
allResults.description:
We’ve been serving companies across the UK & Ireland since 1996, providing exceptional machinery for food packaging lines. We help our customers to boost their quality, speed and efficiency, and we back this up with world-class service, support and training. We design and project manage the installation of bespoke machines across the full production line. Our network of partnerships has helped us to expand our range to offer automated full line solutions which are flexible enough to fit around your business needs and respond to a changing market. allResults.name: Compar AG - vision systems & robotics
allResults.description:
Compar industrial machine vision systems are the solution wherever quality control is required, zero-defects strategies are applied, or value for money and high productivity are needed. The main functions are inspection, identification, and robot guidance. Customers in all industries – however, especially in the automotive, watchmaking, packaging, printing, electronics, medical and pharmaceutical sector – appreciate our innovative package solutions based on a modular system.

Aspiring to be your competent system provider for machine vision and robotics, we offer solutions that include smart cameras, computer-based vision systems, accurate robots, and even integrated test installations that allow for highly flexible handling. It is our interdisciplinary and interconnected engineering knowledge about automation, image processing and robotics that enables us to create efficient systems that convince and delight our clients. Our goal is to always support your progress with foresight and sustainability. || Compar industrial machine vision systems are the solution wherever quality control is required, zero-defects strategies are applied, or value for money and high productivity are needed. allResults.name: AugmentX Solutions
allResults.description:
AugmentX Solutions Limited is a UK-based consulting firm specializing in SAP digital transformation and intelligent automation through AI. We help businesses modernize and optimize their operations by delivering expert SAP solutions and AI-powered automation. Our dual focus on SAP and AI empowers clients to enhance agility, reduce operational costs, and streamline complex business processes. We are proud members of the SAP® PartnerEdge® Open Ecosystem – Build, enabling us to deliver SAP-aligned solutions, develop certified extensions, and integrate SAP with external platforms like Magento, Salesforce, and more. Our SAP & AI Services SAP ECC to S/4HANA Migrations SAP Greenfield & Brownfield Implementations SAP Business Technology Platform (SAP BTP) Integration SAP Application Management & Support SAP System Integration & Data Migration Agentic AI Process Automation Intelligent Data & Insights Document & Workflow Intelligence Why AugmentX? SAP + AI Expertise Under One Roof UK-Registered with Offshore Delivery Capabilities Focused on Mid-market SAP Transformations Lean, Agile, and Cost-effective Project Delivery Experienced Team of SAP Solution Architects & AI Developers Let’s Collaborate AugmentX Solutions is your trusted partner for scalable SAP modernization and automation with AI Services.  Let’s co-create a smarter, more efficient enterprise. Website: www.augmentxsolutions.com Email: info@augmentxsolutions.com || AugmentX Solutions Limited is a next-generation SAP and AI consulting company built to empower enterprises on their digital transformation journey. 

Our Expertise 

� SAP Consulting & Services 

•	End-to-End Solutions: Implementation, migration, integration, and continuous optimization of SAP systems. 
•	Customized Approach: Tailored SAP solutions aligned with your business goals for maximum impact. 
•	Advanced SAP Technologies: Leveraging S/4HANA, BTP, and integration frameworks to drive efficiency and innovation. 

� AI & Agentic AI Services 

•	Agentic AI Process Automation: AI agents that execute repetitive workflows and reduce manual effort. 
•	Intelligent Data & Insights: AI-powered analytics that turn enterprise data into real-time decisions. 
•	Cognitive Assistants: Smart chat and decision agents that support teams with instant knowledge and recommendations. 
•	Document & Workflow Intelligence: Automating document processing, reporting, and exception handling with AI. 
•	Predictive & Adaptive Systems: Solutions that learn continuously to improve business outcomes over time. 

At AugmentX, we create intelligent ecosystems that amplify business performance and redefine efficiency.

� Contact Us

For Enquiry: info@augmentxsolutions.com

allResults.name: AI Consultants London
allResults.description: AI Consultants London is a leading AI consultancy in London helping businesses automate processes, reduce costs and improve productivity with practical AI solutions. We specialise in AI consulting, AI automation, workflow automation and AI implementation for SMEs and growing businesses across London and the UK. Our services include AI audits, business process automation, custom AI tools, and Microsoft Copilot training for teams. We help identify where your business is losing time and money, then implement AI systems that streamline operations, automate repetitive tasks and deliver measurable results. We also provide AI training and Copilot training to help teams adopt AI effectively, improve efficiency and work smarter using tools like Microsoft 365 Copilot, ChatGPT and other AI platforms. If you’re looking for an AI consulting company in London to automate workflows, reduce manual work and scale your business with AI, we provide tailored, results-driven solutions. Serving businesses across London and the UK. Book a consultation to discover how AI can transform your business. || AI Business Consulting | AI Consultants London is a leading AI consultancy in London helping businesses automate processes, reduce costs and improve productivity with practical AI solutions. We specialise in AI consulting, AI automation, workflow automation and AI implementation for SMEs and growing businesses across London and the UK. Our services include AI audits, business process automation, custom AI tools, and Microsoft Copilot training for teams. We help identify where your business is losing time and money, then implement AI systems that streamline operations, automate repetitive tasks and deliver measurable results. We also provide AI training and Copilot training to help teams adopt AI effectively, improve efficiency and work smarter using tools like Microsoft 365 Copilot, ChatGPT and other AI platforms. If you’re looking for an AI consulting company in London to automate workflows, reduce manual work and scale your business with AI, we provide tailored, results-driven solutions. Serving businesses across London and the UK. Book a consultation to discover how AI can transform your business.

allResults.name: Automation & Control Services
allResults.description: Automation & Control Services offers complete turnkey automation solutions utilising in-house resources and their network of mechanical and electrical contractors. Their factory-authorised robotic system integrator represents and supports most major robot brands. They offer an in-house UL Listed panel shop capable of building OEM panels in quantity or custom, one-off designs. || Certified Industrial Control System & Robotic System Integrator with over . ACS has an onsite UL508A, UL698A, UL913, and UL1203 listed Control Panel Shop. We also have extensive experience with machine and process design and our own in-house CNC machining, fabrication, welding, and 3D printing capabilities. | Automation & Control Services provides designs for automotive control systems and equipment. | Automation & Control Services offers complete turnkey automation solutions utilising in-house resources and their network of mechanical and electrical contractors. Their factory-authorised robotic system integrator represents and supports most major robot brands. They offer an in-house UL Listed panel shop capable of building OEM panels in quantity or custom, one-off designs. | Automation & Control Services, Inc. is a full service Industrial Automation System Integrator specializing in the proper application of PLC controls (Primarily Allen-Bradley) and instrumentation in a variety of industries including Pharmaceutical, Food, Auto, Steel, Household Products, Material Handling, Municipal Water, and Wastewater Treatment.    We provide the following in-house services: UL industrial control panel manufacturing shop, Vision Inspection Systems (Primarily Cognex and Keyence), Machine Design, Metal and Composite fabrication, Sanitary Tubing & Pipe Orbital Welding, 3D part design & prototyping, 3D printing, multi-axis HAAS CNC machining services, and Infrared Vision & AWS Weld Inspection services.  Our control panel shop is one of only a few hundred worldwide certified to produce standard UL 508A Industrial Control Panels, UL 698A Industrial Control Panels with Intrinsic Safety Barriers for Hazardous Environments, and Industrial Control Panels for both Dust and Flammable Gases and Liquids for use in a hazardous environments.  We work throughout North America and have the ability to provide remote support access via the internet or Cellular Modem if infrastructure does not exist to assist your on-site maintenance staff with troubleshooting or periodic maintenance without the need to travel long distances for routing work.  We are able to accommodate site visits on short notice throughout the Midwest and Eastern United States through the use of our company owned and operated aircraft. | Automation Consultants in Schererville, IN. | Electric Contractors | About We are the Midwest's Premier Industrial Control and Robotic System Integrator. We manufacture and suppport systems for a variety of system manufacturers. Company Overview We specialize in Industrial Process Control Systems for manufactruring a variety of products from Pharmaceuticals to Waste Water Treatment. We also have onsite ... design and fabrication capabilities including multiple welding processes and also 4-Axis CNC machining capabilities. We also provide Robotic Cell design, installation, and support fo most major brands inclduing Yaskawa, ABB, Codian, and Fanuc. See more Since its establishment in 1994, Automation & Control Services, Inc. has focused on providing control system integration services for a variety of manufacturing ... and service industries throughout the United States and North America. Our business supports many diverse industries including automotive assembly, pharmaceutical, chemical processing, packaging, material handling, electrical generation, wastewater processing, and healthcare. Our customers vary in size from small family-owned businesses to Fortune 500 companies. We have maintained a leadership role in industrial automation and control system integration by investing heavily in PLC hardware and software for use as in-house training platforms, system development tools, and demonstration units. We maintain a close working relationship with Rockwell Automation as a Rockwell Authorized System Integrator and specialize in Allen-Bradley's line of Automation and Industrial Control components. We have hands-on experience with all major brands of Industrial Automation equipment and SCADA software including Fanuc Automation, Siemens, Modicon, GE, Omron, Toshiba, Wonderware & Intellution. Our in-house CNC machining, fabrication, 3D printing, and software design tools allow us to design and manufacture a variety of specialized pices of equipment. We have designed and built single purpose, continous production machines, food processing equipment, liquid processing skids, and in plant system to highly flexible robotic cells and tooling. Please contact us to discuss your needs and help you determine the proper scope of work for your project. See more Founding date July, 1994 Products Turn-Key Control Systems, PLC Programming, Electrical troublehsooting services. UL Industrial Control Panels, Equipment Supports and Platforms, Packaging equipment, Intelligent Machine Vision Systems, and Custom CNC Machining services.

allResults.name: 1 Vision
allResults.description:
1Vision Ltd supplies components and solutions for machine vision and industrial imaging systems. The company offers edge cameras, machine vision cameras, lenses, illumination units, frame grabbers, cables, mounting hardware, and related accessories. It supports applications involving deep learning and AI-based vision, high-speed line scan imaging, and digital video recording. 1Vision also provides barcode and visual inspection tools and image processing software for automation and manufacturing environments. || The organization strives to delivery a brighter future for all, through innovation, collaboration, and compassion to address global challenges and promote healthcare and social equality | 1vision, LLC was founded in 2014. The company's line of business includes developing or modifying computer software and packaging. | 1Vision Ltd distributes machine vision cameras, optics, illumination, acquisition hardware and accessories for industrial imaging systems. | 1Vision Ltd supplies components and solutions for machine vision and industrial imaging systems. The company offers edge cameras, machine vision cameras, lenses, illumination units, frame grabbers, cables, mounting hardware, and related accessories. It supports applications involving deep learning and AI-based vision, high-speed line scan imaging, and digital video recording. 1Vision also provides barcode and visual inspection tools and image processing software for automation and manufacturing environments. | 1Vision provides imaging & machine vision products and solutions to the Israeli market.

The mission of 1Vision is to fulfill customers' needs based on vast experience in building vision systems, extensive knowledge in machine vision, know how skills in software and hardware integration, project management capabilities and excellent service and support.

 Occupational domains

* Manufacturer distribution
* Providing Image Processing and Visual Inspection solutions for the industrial OEM, defense and academic segments
* Consulting for production floor machine vision based manufacturers
* Customer defined application development
* Customer defined product development [turn-key solutions]
* Project management
* Customer support

Products portfolio includes:

* Imaging sensors & cameras (Industrial, Scientific, Line-Scan, Multispectral, High Speed)
* Optical elements & lenses (Machine Vision, Macro, Telecentric, CCTV Surveillance, Microscope Objectives)
* Illumination systems (Ring, Line, Backlight, Dome, Co-Axial, Bar, Light Source)
* Image acquisition & processing hardware (Camera Link, CoaXPress, DVI, Analog, VGA)
* Cables & accessories (Camera link, GigE-Vision, FireWire, CoaXPress, Analog)
* Software for machine vision (OEM & End-User oriented)
* Embedded & PC-based imaging systems
* 3D reconstruction, positioning and tracking
* High speed video recording systems | About 1Vision is a leading Israeli provider of Image Processing and Visual Inspection solutions for the OEM industrial, defense and academic segments Additional Information The mission of 1Vision is to fulfill customers'​ needs based on vast experience in building vision systems, extensive knowledge in machine vision, know how skil ... ls in software and hardware integration, project management capabilities and excellent service and support. allResults.name: HANZA
allResults.description:
HANZA is a fast growing industrial business partner within manufacturing. || HANZA is a fast growing industrial business partner within manufacturing. | HANZA Group are a global industrial business partner within manufacturing. They have learned that, in order to be successful in this industry, you can not only focus on production. You need to understand how to improve the existing business of your customers. They have taken all their knowledge and experience and developed a concept they call MIG™. By using this concept together with their full range of manufacturing solutions (mechanics, electronics, cables and final assembly) they offer a partnership that will increase growth and profitability for every customer. It doesn’t end here. By combining the minds of more than 2800 brilliant co-workers you will engage a strong, creative and strategic partner that continuously will be ahead of the game. | Hanza AB (publ), together with its subsidiaries, provides contract manufacturing solutions in Sweden, Finland, Estonia, Germany, Poland, the Czech Republic, rest of the European Union, Norway, rest of Europe, North America, and internationally. It operates through Main Markets, Other Markets, and Business Development and Services segments. The company offers machining solutions comprising grinding, turbine component, milling, turning, electrical discharge machining, assembly, logistics, and prototype services; sheet metal processing solutions consisting of punching and laser cutting, bending, welding, coating, and surface treatment services; heavy mechanics solutions, such as welding TIG/MIG, machining, and cutting technologies solutions; and electronics manufacturing solutions, including research and development, printed circuit board assembly, and research and development test development center services. It also provides wire harness solutions comprising automated cut-strip-crimp wire processing, cut and strip technology, crimp tool, low- and high-pressure molding of cables, cable and label marking, multi-channel testing, and ultrasonic welding services, as well as laser engraving, pad printing, and hot stamping for plastic parts; and assembly solutions, including design and development, test development, and design and adaptation services. In addition, the company offers business consulting; and tech solutions, including development projects, electronics, mechanics, and software. Hanza AB (publ) was incorporated in 2008 and is headquartered in Kista, Sweden. | Hanza AB is a Sweden-based company operating as an industrial business partner providing manufacture services. It provides complete manufacture solutions in the areas of mechanics, electronics, cable harnesses and final assembly. The Company has two segments: Mechanics, further divided into the Light Mechanics division; and the Heavy Mechanics division; and Electronics, further divided into Printed Circuit Board (PCB), which offers assembly of both flexible boards and large PCBs, KA Elektronik AB, as well as services such as automated optical inspection and testing, and Technology cabling, which manufactures and supplies cables for all applications. The department Business Solutions involves strategy, business development, marketing and business implementation of Hanza AB's concepts. The Company operates in Sweden, Finland, Estonia, Poland, Slovakia and China. Its customers include Atlas Copco, Ericsson, ABB, and Saab Defense. | HANZA AB operates as a streamlining contract manufacturing. The Company manufactures and distributes machine tools, sheet metal, PCB assembly, and electronic cables for manufacturing companies. HANZA serves customers worldwide. | HANZA jest w pełni uniwersalną agencją interaktywną. Oferuje kompleksowe rozwiązania internetowe - od kreacji, pomysłów, nieszablonowej grafiki po rozwiązania technologiczne, zarządzanie projektami i ich późniejszą obsługę. Prowadzimy kampanie marketingowe oraz pozycjonowanie serwisów w wyszukiwarkach. Internet nie ma przed nami wielu tajemnic. | HANZA is a global knowledge-based manufacturing company that modernizes and streamlines the manufacturing industry.
Through production facilities with various manufacturing technologies grouped into local clusters as well as advisory services,
we create shorter lead times, more environmentally friendly processes and increased profitability for our customers.
This means we are contributing to a better and more sustainable future.

The company was founded in 2008 and today has sales exceeding SEK 2 billion, with operations in Sweden, Germany, Finland, Estonia, Poland,
the Czech Republic and China. Among our clients you find leading companies such as ABB, Epiroc, Getinge, Oerlikon, Saab and Siemens.

We are operating in six HANZA Clusters, offering many different manufacturing technologies:
PCBA, cable harnesses, turning, sheet metal mechanics, milling, heavy mechanincs, surface treatment, powder coating, welding, assembly, testing, design & engineering services and more.
We have ISO 9001, ISO 14001, ISO 45001, ISO 3834-2, OHSAS 18001, TS 13485 and AS 9100 certified factories.

Awards:
HANZA appointed Supplier of the year by 3M (2019)
HANZA Mechanics Tartu “Supplier Excellence Award in a fight against Covid-19\' by PerkinElmer (2020) | Hanza AB provides professional engineering services. The Company offers mechanics and electronics related services including turning, milling, sheet metal production, surface mounting, and inspection. Hanza serves customers throughout Europe. | Vaasa Mechanics Oy, doing business as HANZA Mechanics Finland, Oy, manufactures and assembles sheet metal mechanics. The Company produces a range of solutions contributing to its parent's product offering using various processes including turretpunching, bending, excentric pressing, automatic pressing, and welding. HANZA Mechanics Finland serves customers throughout Scandinavia. | Opis:HANZA is a global knowledge and manufacturing company that has been modernizing and streamlining contract manufacturing since 2008.piątek, 6 października 2023 - 15:24:03 | HANZA is a global knowledge-based manufacturing company that modernizes and streamlines the manufacturing industry. Through production facilities with various manufacturing technologies grouped into local clusters as well as advisory services, we create shorter lead times, more environmentally friendly processes and increased profitability for our customers. The company was founded in 2008 and has since 2019 had sales exceeding SEK 2 billion. The company has six manufacturing clusters; Sweden, Finland, Germany, Baltics, Central Europe and China. Among HANZA’s clients are leading companies such as 3M, ABB, Epiroc, GE, Getinge, John Deere, SAAB, Sandvik, Siemens and Tomra. Our factories are strategically located geographically close to each other, in so-called manufacturing clusters, to create synergies between the various technologies such as shorter lead times, fewer transports, reduced emissions and lower total costs. With a total of 130,000 square meters of production area divided between 17 factories and 7 factory parks in Europe and Asia, we offer complete manufacturing in electronics, machining, sheet metal mechanics, heavy mechanics, wire harnesses and complex assembly services. Our manufacturing clusters bring together state-of-the-art machines for virtually all production needs. We always strive to minimize costs, shorten lead times and reduce environmental impact, primarily by increasing efficiency and reducing the need for transport. A high degree of automation and flexibility means that we can handle both smaller and larger volumes. We have ISO 9001, ISO 14001, ISO 45001, ISO 3834-2, ISO 27001, ISO 13485 and AS 9100 certified factories. Awards: HANZA appointed Supplier of the year by 3M (2019) HANZA Mechanics Tartu “Supplier Excellence Award in a fight against Covid-19" and "2020 Supplier Recognition Award" by PerkinElmer HANZA Mechanics Tartu "Supplier award in a fight against Covid-19" by Getinge

allResults.name: Contract Production
allResults.description:
Contract Electronics Manufacturing & Production

Contract Production Ltd specialises in providing low to medium volume contract electronics manufacturing (CEM) services to a range of companies across a wide variety of industries and market sectors.

We offer PCB assembly, box build, 3D AOI and turnkey assembly services covering material procurement, supply chain management, PCB Assembly,  Prototyping, Testing and quality assurance all under one roof.


Our customers cover a range of high technology market sectors including instrumentation, test and measurement and monitoring and for each of these customers we provide a range of different services, each tailored to suit their own individual needs.


Our range of services includes:

    Automated high-speed SMT assembly
    Conventional through-hole assembly
    Complete box build and test solutions
    3D Automated Optical Inspection (AOI)
    Full test and inspection
    Wave Soldering
    Conformal Coating
    Potting & Encapsulation
    Procurement and QA
    Project Management


Our aim is to provide our customers with a flexible, customer focussed service that meets their needs at every step in the manufacturing chain.

To discuss any requirements that you may have or to find out more about how we can help with your PCB assembly needs, please contact us;

Phone: +44 (0)1751 475950
Email: sales@contractproduction.co.uk || Contract Production provides sub-contract electronics manufacturing services | Contract Electronics Manufacturing & Production
